item.description:
# OnlyEQ 1.2.2
- Removes the menu-bar popover opening and closing animation. - Replaces the pointed popover shell with a rounded, arrowless menu panel. - Makes the OnlyEQ panel appear immediately and accept input as soon as the menu-bar icon is clicked. - Keeps the menu-bar icon brightly highlighted while the panel is open. - Matches EQ-node dragging, spectrum presentation, peak metering, and volume publication to the active display refresh rate, including 120 Hz ProMotion screens. - Caches size-independent EQ response data during live window resizing and recalculates only bands whose parameters changed. - Prevents editor intrinsic-size feedback while resizing its window.
